Xojo Syntax Highlighting

CodeMirror 6

StreamLanguage definition — fully editable, works with any CodeMirror 6 theme.

Live Editor

Loading CodeMirror…

Token Coverage

keywordVar Sub If Return…
atomTrue False Nil
typeInteger String Double…
builtinSelf Super Me
comment// line ' apostrophe
string"double quoted"
number42 3.14 &hFF &b1010
meta#pragma #tag #if #endif

Usage

1. Browser — direct CDN imports (no import map needed):

<script type="module">
import { EditorView, basicSetup } from "https://esm.sh/codemirror@6"
import { StreamLanguage }         from "https://esm.sh/@codemirror/language@6"
import { xojoStreamParser }       from "./xojo.codemirror.js"

new EditorView({
  doc: sourceCode,
  extensions: [
    basicSetup,
    StreamLanguage.define(xojoStreamParser),
  ],
  parent: document.querySelector('#editor'),
})
</script>

2. npm / bundler (Vite, Webpack, Rollup):

import { EditorView, basicSetup } from "codemirror"
import { StreamLanguage }         from "@codemirror/language"
import { xojoStreamParser }       from "xojo-syntax-highlight/codemirror"

// Same EditorView setup as above
